name: SDKs JWT Verification
description: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a verifiable credential from Cloud Agent and then send a presentation to another edge agent who will verify it
descriptionHtml: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a verifiable credential from Cloud Agent and then send a presentation to another edge agent who will verify it

testStage.description: The Edge Agent should be able to receive a verifiable credential from Cloud Agent and then send a presentation to another edge agent who will verify it

steps.name: Given Cloud Agent is connected to Edge Agent
And Edge Agent has '1' jwt credentials issued by Cloud Agent
Then Verifier Edge Agent will request Edge Agent to verify the JWT credential
When Edge Agent sends the verification proof
Then Verifier Edge Agent should see the verification proof is verified
